name: San Diego School Bus Co LLC
recent_news: No news, press, or M&A coverage found. Registered address (122 15th St #531, Del Mar, CA 92014) is a private/postal-box style location, not a bus yard, suggesting either a shell LLC or a very small home-based operator. No website or active phone in source data.
fit_notes: Likely too small to be a meaningful tuck-in (sub-$200K revenue, 4 employees, no public footprint). Address pattern (suite #531 in Del Mar) suggests mailbox, not operating yard. Verify legal existence via CA SOS before further pursuit; even if real, scale and lack of contracts make it a low-priority lead in a major MSA already covered by larger operators (NCST, Durham/Summit, First Student).

name: E & E Bus Svc LLC
districts_or_customers: likely East Baton Rouge Parish School System (EBRPSS) sub-contract route(s); not confirmed
recent_news: No press coverage, M&A activity, or web presence located. EBRPSS uses a mix of district-owned and privately-owned buses operated by independent owner-operators under route contracts, which is consistent with a 4-employee micro-operator at this Elmer Ave address in north Baton Rouge.
fit_notes: Classic Louisiana owner-operator profile: single-bus or few-bus contractor serving EBRPSS routes. Too small for a standalone tuck-in but could roll up alongside other EBR-area owner-operators if Summit pursued a Baton Rouge platform play. Independent verification of contracts, fleet, and willingness to sell required.

name: G Brown Bus Svc
principals: G. Brown (presumed owner-operator; full name not public)
districts_or_customers: Zachary Community School District route (Zachary CSD's prime contractor is First Student per district materials, so G Brown is most likely a sub-route owner-operator; not confirmed)
recent_news: USDOT #604067 active with FMCSA showing 1 power unit and 1 driver, consistent with a single-bus owner-operator. No press, M&A, or safety incidents surfaced. First Student operates the broader Zachary CSD contract from 4922 Rankin St, Zachary.
fit_notes: Single-bus owner-operator -- not a tuck-in candidate on its own (no scale, no platform value). Only relevant if Summit attempted a roll-up of Louisiana owner-operators tied to a specific district, in which case G Brown would be a one-route asset purchase, not a corporate acquisition.

name: College Bus LLC
districts_or_customers: unknown; address (626 Clinton Ln, 44143) is in Highland Heights / Mayfield Heights area, suburban east Cleveland near Mayfield City Schools and Cleveland Heights-University Heights CSD
recent_news: No press, ownership, or M&A information located. Name 'College Bus' is generic and overlaps in search with charter/coach providers; no Ohio PUCO or FMCSA carrier profile surfaced under this exact name from public search.
fit_notes: Address pattern (Clinton Ln, residential suburb) and 4-employee headcount suggest a home-based micro-operator, possibly a single-route SPED/charter-school contractor rather than a district prime. Too small to move the needle as a standalone tuck-in; only interesting as a tag-along to a larger NE Ohio platform deal. Verify legal entity status via Ohio Secretary of State and PUCO PUPT certification before pursuing.

name: Creative Bus Solutions Inc
recent_news: No press coverage, M&A activity, or website located for this specific entity. NOT to be confused with Creative Bus Sales Inc (the national bus dealership now rebranded as Model 1 Commercial Vehicles, HQ Chino CA, Sacramento dealer location at 7471 Reese Rd) -- different entity, different address (1720 Wentworth Ave is a residential South Sacramento address). A separate 'Creative Bus LLC' carries USDOT #2088588 but is a different legal entity.
fit_notes: Home-based micro-operator (4 employees, residential Sacramento address, sub-$200K revenue) named Jill England as owner -- too small to be a meaningful Summit tuck-in on its own. Possible single-route SPED or charter-school contractor. Critical to disambiguate from the much larger Creative Bus Sales / Model 1 dealership; do not confuse the two in pipeline tracking. Verify CA SOS standing and any CHP SPAB certification before further work.
